title: Low‑Code Developer (Mendix)
description:
Mendix Low‑Code Engineer — Build Enterprise‑Scale Impact at Kyndryl

If you're looking for a role where your low‑code expertise genuinely shapes the way large organizations operate, this is the place for you. At Kyndryl, you won’t just build small apps—you’ll design enterprise‑grade Mendix solutions that thousands of users rely on daily. You’ll join a global engineering culture where your ideas matter, your skills are trusted, and your work directly improves how businesses run.

Most companies use low‑code for basic prototypes or internal utilities.
At Kyndryl, you’ll use Mendix to modernize mission‑critical systems and transform complex processes at scale. You’ll own the full solution lifecycle, work with enterprise architects, and influence how entire organizations adopt digital transformation.

What You’ll Do

You’ll play a key role in designing intelligent, scalable Mendix applications that streamline operations and deliver real business outcomes. Your work will be hands‑on, strategic, and highly visible—giving you the autonomy to build solutions that truly make an impact.

1) Design, Build & Deploy Enterprise Mendix Applications

You’ll create end‑to‑end applications using Mendix Studio Pro—including domain models, microflows, UI pages, reusable components, and secure user roles. You’ll build applications that reduce manual work, improve decision‑making, and solve real operational challenges.

2) Streamline & Automate Business Processes

You’ll use Mendix workflows, logic flows, rules, and automation capabilities to eliminate inefficiencies. You’ll turn manual steps into intelligent workflows, integrate data across systems, and ensure everything runs smoothly with proper validation and governance.

3) Integrate Systems & Build Scalable Data Models

You’ll design clean, scalable data models and connect Mendix apps with enterprise systems—via REST/SOAP APIs, Databases, Microsoft services, or ERP/CRM platforms. Your integrations will form the backbone of seamless cross‑system operations.

Why You’ll Love Working at Kyndryl

You’ll build for the enterprise, not just for a department.

Your applications will support real business operations—governments, banks, global supply chains, healthcare institutions, and more.

You get ownership. Real ownership.

You’ll influence solution design, architecture decisions, and integration patterns—not just “configure forms” or “drag and drop screens.”

You grow into the next version of yourself.

Kyndryl invests heavily in talent development. As you expand your Mendix capability, you’ll have clear paths toward roles such as:

  • Low‑Code Solution Architect
  • Technical Lead (Mendix)
  • Enterprise Integration Engineer
  • Platform Owner / Low‑Code Governance Lead
  • Full Stack or Hybrid Developer (if that’s a path you want)

Here, you’re not limited to low‑code—you can grow your engineering, cloud, architecture, and leadership career in whichever direction you choose.

Required Skills & Experience

  • At least 4 years of hands‑on Mendix or low‑code development experience (Mendix Studio Pro strongly preferred).
  • Experience working with Git and Agile teams (Scrum, CI, pair programming).
  • Knowledge of HTML, CSS, JavaScript, SQL/NoSQL databases.
  • Experience integrating apps with REST/SOAP APIs and enterprise systems.
  • Strong analytical and problem‑solving skills, plus the ability to collaborate with both technical and non‑technical stakeholders.
  • High attention to detail and commitment to delivering quality applications.

Preferred Skills & Experience

  • Mendix certifications (Rapid, Intermediate, Advanced, Expert).
  • Experience with CI/CD pipelines or DevOps practices.
  • Exposure to mobile development in Mendix.
  • Familiarity with other low‑code platforms (OutSystems, Power Apps, Appian, ServiceNow, Dynamics 365, SharePoint Online).
  • Experience managing platform‑level features such as rules engines, workflows, access roles, validations, UI flows, and reusable modules.

At Kyndryl, you’ll be part of a global engineering powerhouse where low‑code isn’t an afterthought—it’s a strategic capability. You’ll design impactful applications, solve meaningful problems, and grow into a technical leader who shapes how enterprises operate.

If you're ready to build solutions that matter, this is where your next chapter begins.

postedCompany.description:
Kyndryl is the world's largest provider of IT infrastructure services, dedicated to designing, building, managing, and modernizing the mission-critical technology systems that power the global digital economy. 

Kyndryl operates in over 60 countries, serving a diverse range of industries including banking, healthcare, retail, and telecommunications. The company's expertise spans cloud services, cybersecurity, AI-driven automation, and digital transformation, enabling organizations to enhance resilience, agility, and innovation. With a customer-centric approach, Kyndryl collaborates closely with clients and technology partners to co-create solutions that drive business outcomes and accelerate growth in the digital era.
postedCompany.name: KYNDRYL (SINGAPORE) PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
